message:
refactor(node): extend HashMap → BTreeMap determinism migration to 12 additional modules

Continue the systematic replacement of HashMap with BTreeMap across the
node codebase for deterministic iteration order. This batch covers:

API layer: compat_gate, middleware, service
Conformance: connector_method_validator
Connector: error_code_registry, telemetry_namespace, tiered_trust_storage, trust_object_id
Control plane: key_role_separation
Policy: compat_gates (ShimRegistry, CompatGateEvaluator)
Storage: frankensqlite_adapter
Supply chain: revocation_registry

Total: 51 insertions, 51 deletions — pure mechanical HashMap→BTreeMap
substitution with no behavioral changes. Eliminates non-deterministic
iteration in security-sensitive code paths where ordering affects
audit trail reproducibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
